title: Logging into iMicrobe.us
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5et6g","text":"Procedure to create an account, loging in and out of iMicrobe and exploring your dashboard.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Connect to Cyverse and create your account. If you already have an account, please go to step 2.

Once your Cyverse account is created, you have access to iMicrobe. In order to log into iMicrobe , click on the 'Log In' tab. You will be automatically redirected to the Cyverse authetication page. Enter your Cyverse user name and password. Once you have signed in, you'll be redirected to the iMicrobe webpage.

Once you have logged into iMicrobe, you have access to your personnal dashboard. To access your dashboard, click on the 'My Account' tab, and then on 'Dashboard'. Alternatively, you can click on the Dashboard icon at the top right of the webpage. a
creator: Alise J Ponsero
